# Schema Optimization Logic

*This document is generated by the db-migration agent during Phase 2.*
*Every optimization includes the reasoning, not just the mapping.*

## Status: Pending

Run Phase 2 to populate this document with actual optimizations from the WideWorldImporters migration.

## Type Optimizations

| Source Type | Target Type | Why This Optimization |
|---|---|---|
| `NVARCHAR(MAX)` | `TEXT` | PG stores all strings as Unicode natively. `TEXT` has no length limit and is stored identically to `VARCHAR` in PG (no performance difference). |
| `NVARCHAR(50)` | `VARCHAR(50)` | Preserves the length constraint for data validation. PG `VARCHAR` is Unicode by default. |
| `BIT` | `BOOLEAN` | PG `BOOLEAN` is semantically correct (TRUE/FALSE vs 0/1). Enables cleaner conditionals. |
| `DECIMAL(18,2)` | `NUMERIC(18,2)` | Functionally identical. PG convention uses `NUMERIC`. No precision loss. |
| `DATETIME2` | `TIMESTAMPTZ` | PG best practice: always timezone-aware. Prevents timezone bugs in distributed systems. |
| `UNIQUEIDENTIFIER` | `UUID` | Native PG type. Use `gen_random_uuid()` for generation (PG 13+). |
| `MONEY` | `NUMERIC(19,4)` | PG `MONEY` type is locale-dependent. `NUMERIC` is safer for financial data. |
| `HIERARCHYID` | `TEXT` then `ltree` | No direct PG equivalent. Store as TEXT initially, migrate to ltree extension for path queries. |
| `GEOGRAPHY` | PostGIS `geography` | Requires PostGIS extension. Functionally equivalent spatial operations. |

## Index Optimizations

| Source Pattern | Target | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Clustered index on PK | B-tree PK | PG tables are heap-organized. No clustered index concept. |
| Filtered index | Partial index | PG partial indexes are more flexible. |
| Full-text index | tsvector + GIN | PG built-in FTS. No separate catalog needed. |
| Columnstore index | *Flag for review* | No direct equivalent. Migrate analytics to Fabric. |

## Stored Procedure Optimizations

| Source Pattern | Target | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Cursor-based processing | Set-based CTE / window function | 10-100x performance improvement. Idiomatic PG. |
| Multiple result sets | Split into multiple functions | PG = one result set per function. |
| sp_executesql | EXECUTE format() with %I/%L | PG format() prevents SQL injection by design. |
| TRY/CATCH | EXCEPTION WHEN | Block-scoped. More granular control. |
